statements.content: Overflow contents include texts or components that exceed the given space. Depict following images below to let users know that there are continuous contents.
console/19018431/399493954/preview?scrollOffset=912

Overflow menu is used when there are many action buttons or when displaying functions of low priority. Overflow menu can be considered when there are more that 2 action buttons in general. Hidden functions can be display upon selection. Apply to small areas like data table header, card header, data table/ list rows, and tabs.

1. Action buttons of low priority is placed in overflow menu regardless of the space available.
2. Actions available per row is shown in overflow menu. Right clicking brings up same functions.
3. Actions available within the card can be shown through overflow menu.
4. Action buttons that can edit tabs(e.g. shutdowm, rename, expand) can be shown through overflow menu.
Page numbers can be abbreviate when there are more pages than the given space for pagination. Hidden pages can show by selecting the overflow button. Refer to pagination for more details.

Slice Realtime Performance Monitoring

Repeating texts within long item names can be trancated. Depending on the repetition, front, middle, and end can be shortened, with the whole name showing as tooltip upon hover. Following image shows when middle part of the link is truncated. Extension name should not be truncated. Following imaged show truncation in the front, middle, and end in sequence.

Repeating texts within long links can be trancated. Depending on the repetition, front, middle, and end can be shortened, with the whole link showing as tooltip upon hover. Following image shows when middle part of the link is truncated.
Routes in the middle can be abbreviated when they become longer. Show hidden route by overflow menu list, and transition into the selected item from the list instantly. Refer to breadcrumb guide.

Chips can be used to abbreviate the number of chips that cannot fit into the given space. Amount of abbreviated chips are shown, with list being able to be checked upon selection.

1. Amount of filters that could not be shown.
2. Amount of hidden roles.

“Show more” button is used when there are lots of overflow menus within a limited space. In general, all the contents should show upon selecting the button, but can be divided into chunks if there are more hidden contents. When used in lists, “show more” button is added on the 6th row.

Dropdown button is used when the amount of tabs increases to the point where all of the tabs cannot be shown. List should not just contain the names of the hidden tabs but the functions provided by each as well. Dropdown button can show and hide depending on the width and resolution of the given page. Refer to tab guide.
Ellipsis is used when texts or action button surpasses the given space.

Action buttons, breadcrumbs, links(long URL), 
long item name, pagination
Amount of exceeding items that cannot be shown.
Chips (e.g. Applied filters, uploaded items)
Show more allows all the hidden contents to be shownwhen there are lots of overflowing contents
Dropdown is used when all tabs cannot be shown.
Page header, dialog header, label, error messages, validation messages, help, or notification must never be truncated.
Truncation can be divided into 4 types as shown below.
